vitals.terrain: rolling countryside with six gravel sectors (38 km total on long course)

course_description.overview: The long course is 134 km featuring a highly-enjoyable 60 km loop raced twice, passing through Gamla Uppsala Royal Viking Mounds and Uppsala County's rolling countryside with six gravel sectors totaling 38 km. Medium course is 79 km with three gravel sectors totaling 19 km.[1][2][5]

key_segments.name: Gamla Uppsala Royal Viking Mounds
key_segments.description: Route passes historic Royal Viking Mounds in rolling countryside.

key_segments.name: 60 km Loop (x2 for long course)
key_segments.description: Core loop through glorious Uppsala countryside with gravel sectors.

key_segments.name: Gravel Sectors
key_segments.description: Six sectors adding challenge to the mixed-surface route.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging with 1,800 m elevation gain over rolling terrain, significant gravel (28% of long course), suitable for competitive road cyclists seeking qualifier status for GFNY Worlds. Long course is competitive with rankings; medium is non-competitive.[1][2]

logistics.getting_there: Close to Stockholm Arlanda airport; start/finish at Ulva Kvarn near Uppsala Central Station. Group ride recon on Friday from Central Station.[3]
logistics.accommodation: N/A; Uppsala offers options as Sweden's 4th largest city near Stockholm.
logistics.registration_details: Online registration with group discounts (25% for 4+ friends, 15% bring-a-friend); includes official GFNY jersey (mandatory), chip timing. Long course eligible for rankings and GFNY qualifiers.[1]
logistics.bike_logistics: Packet pickup Saturday 6:30-7:45 AM; Friday expo/registration 11 AM-7 PM at Ulva Kvarn. Course recon ride Friday 9 AM.[3]
logistics.local_considerations: Serves as GFNY European Championship; top age-group finishers qualify for World events. Recommended arrival Friday.[1][3]

final_verdict.one_liner: GFNY Uppsala blends Swedish history, rolling gravel-road loops, and GFNY prestige near Stockholm.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Competitive road cyclists chasing age-group qualifiers, gravel adventurers, or tourists exploring Viking heritage.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for its unique mixed-terrain challenge, European Championship status, and easy access.
pro_tips: Opt for long course to qualify for GFNY Worlds (top 10% age group).
Join Friday recon ride from Uppsala Central Station.
Book group for 25% discount; wear mandatory GFNY jersey.
Fly into Arlanda; arrive Friday for expo and prep.
